overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene depicting a translucent ghost character floating through the Great Hall of a gothic castle, illuminated by thousands of floating candles. The hall features long dining tables with seated students, high vaulted ceilings, and massive stained glass windows at the far end, rendered in high-fidelity UE5 graphics.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic great hall with floating candles and dining tables

agents.ego_description: translucent blue ghost character floating steadily through the central aisle of the great hall, passing between rows of dining tables

entered.detail: hundreds of lit candles floating magically in the air, providing warm illumination throughout the hall
large ornate stained glass windows at the far end of the hall depicting intricate designs
long wooden tables lined with students, extending down the left side of the hall
long wooden tables lined with students, extending down the right side of the hall
tall gothic stone arches along the left wall supporting the vaulted ceiling

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view from the rear of a vast gothic great hall, following a translucent ghost character as it floats forward between long dining tables. Hundreds of floating candles illuminate the space from above, while students sit at the tables on both sides. The camera maintains a steady third-person follow perspective as the ghost progresses down the central marble aisle toward the stained glass windows at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: front section of great hall approaching the head table

events.description: the head table and raised platform at the front of the hall become clearly visible as the ghost approaches the far end

agents.ego_description: ghost character continuing to float forward, now approaching the front section of the hall near the head table

entered.detail: elevated platform with a long table at the front of the hall where faculty would sit
stone lectern or podium positioned in front of the head table

segments.scene_description: As the ghost moves into the front section of the great hall, the head table and stone podium at the far end come into clear view. The floating candles now appear closer overhead, and the perspective shifts to emphasize the grand scale of the stained glass windows. The students remain seated at the tables as the character approaches the elevated platform area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the rear of a vast gothic great hall toward its grand architectural focal point. It begins by following a translucent ghost character floating forward along a central marble aisle, flanked by long dining tables where students sit beneath a canopy of hundreds of floating candles. As the ghost progresses, the perspective shifts to emphasize the increasing scale of the environment, bringing the overhead candles into closer view. The scene then opens up to reveal the head table and a stone podium at the far end before finally centering on the massive, towering stained glass windows that dominate the front of the hall.
